_comment: Human-editable sign-off record for the EXP-16 prospective-evaluation scoring rule. A statistician reviews docs/PREREGISTRATION.md's 'Scoring rule' section against a real registration artifact and edits this file to record their verdict. `nearmiss preregister` reads this file and stamps its verdict into every registration artifact it writes, so the honesty gate travels with the artifact instead of living only in a doc nobody re-checks.
notes: Not yet reviewed. Registrations produced while status is 'pending_statistician_review' are DRAFTS ONLY and must not be cited as evidence of predictive validity — see docs/PREREGISTRATION.md.
